mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, article_id as articleId, behavior_type as behaviorType, behavior_weight as behaviorWeight, tag_id as tagId, category_id as categoryId, author_id as authorId, create_time as createTime from user_behavior_log where user_id = #{userId} and create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day)
select * from user_behavior_log where user_id = #{userId} and create_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
